author: LyaQanYi
description: OS-level plugin combining a dual-brain memory subsystem (TOML tree + SQLite/FTS5 index, optional sqlite-vec, async hippocampus extractor, retention-decay GC, multi-entity profiles) with a progressive skill router (manifest-based tool discovery, on-demand sub-agent execution).

zh.description: OS 级插件：双脑记忆子系统（TOML 文件 + SQLite/FTS5 索引、可选 sqlite-vec、异步海马体提取、衰减 GC、多实体画像）+ 渐进式技能路由（按 manifest 发现工具、按需注入子代理指令）。
